title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Naukri.com

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Naukri.com
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
